_doc: Editor-prose reference → article-link overrides, shared by the about page (build_about_page.py) and the Reader's Guide (build_readers_guide.py). Keyed by the UPPERCASE reference text as it appears in the prose; value is a canonical article title (resolved through the shared LinkResolver.resolve_reference) or a direct '{stable_id}.json' filename pin where even the title collides. For the handful the resolver's TIGHT rungs can't recall — an ambiguous same-name that the fisher can't split from prose, a plural/variant/hyphenation the prose spells differently from the title, an Æ-fold the fold rung misses. The loose rungs are deliberately NOT bulk-applied (firstword grabs the wrong same-surname person). Accretes as found, like corrections.json.
